citations.quote: Business offices. Ticket offices and newspaper stands... Houses of worship
All uses not expressly permitted in this chapter are prohibited.

zones.notes: Limited to business offices, ticket/newspaper stands, and houses of worship; storage/industrial not listed.

citations.quote: no building shall be used for other than business offices, a post office or houses of worship
All uses not expressly permitted in this chapter are prohibited.

zones.notes: Explicitly limited to offices, post office, and houses of worship.

citations.quote: the following uses and businesses may be conducted
All uses not expressly permitted in this chapter are prohibited.

zones.notes: C-1 lists retail/service uses; no storage, warehouse, or industrial uses listed. Catch-all prohibits unlisted uses.

citations.quote: All uses and businesses permitted in C-1 District. All uses typically associated with a public utility.
All uses not expressly permitted in this chapter are prohibited.

zones.notes: C-2 permits C-1 uses plus public utility uses. No storage/industrial.

citations.quote: All uses and businesses permitted in the C-1 District.
All uses not expressly permitted in this chapter are prohibited.

zones.notes: C-3 permits only C-1 uses; no storage/industrial.

zones.zone_name: Main Street Commercial District Inclusionary Overlay Zone

citations.quote: All uses permitted within the zoning districts underlying this overlay zone.
All uses not expressly permitted in this chapter are prohibited.

zones.notes: Overlay adds multi-family residential to underlying commercial zones (C-1/C-2/C-3); no storage or industrial uses.

citations.quote: No building shall be used for other than a one (1) family dwelling house
All uses not expressly permitted in this chapter are prohibited.

zones.notes: Single-family residential district only; all non-residential uses prohibited by silence and by explicit catch-all.

citations.quote: No building shall be used for other than a one-family dwelling house
All uses not expressly permitted in this chapter are prohibited.

zones.notes: Single-family residential; only conditional use is houses of worship. All target uses prohibited.

parser_warnings: Allenhurst is a small, built-out residential/commercial borough with no industrial zoning district; all target uses are prohibited boroughwide by the catch-all in §26-4.4(g).

citations.quote: No factory buildings or manufacturing of any kind shall be permitted in the commercial district
Uses not expressly permitted in this chapter are prohibited

zones.notes: Commercial district permits retail, services, offices, restaurants, churches. Manufacturing explicitly prohibited; storage uses not listed and thus prohibited per Section 30-83.

citations.quote: Permitted Uses. Golf course. Accessories associated with a golf course. Playground.
Uses not expressly permitted in this chapter are prohibited

zones.notes: Open Space/Recreation zone limited to golf course, accessories, and playground.

citations.quote: No factory buildings or manufacturing of any kind shall be permitted
Uses not expressly permitted in this chapter are prohibited

zones.notes: Residential district; only single-family dwellings permitted. Manufacturing explicitly prohibited.

citations.quote: No factory buildings or manufacturing of any kind shall be permitted
Uses not expressly permitted in this chapter are prohibited

zones.notes: Residential district; only single-family dwellings permitted.

citations.quote: No factory buildings or manufacturing of any kind shall be permitted
Uses not expressly permitted in this chapter are prohibited

zones.notes: Residential district; only single-family dwellings permitted.

citations.quote: No factory buildings or manufacturing of any kind shall be permitted
Uses not expressly permitted in this chapter are prohibited

zones.notes: Residential district; small lot housing. Manufacturing explicitly prohibited.
